mcp_args.prompt:
Russian internet meme collage illustration on pure white #FFFFFF background, ironic humor, cutout stickers, reaction faces, drake-format panels, pepe-adjacent absurdity but original characters, cover typography like DESIGN.md reference: bold condensed uppercase Cyrillic, rotating hot headline accents (hot pink, hot purple, hot blue, hot orange, etc.), sticker labels, brush bubbles, handwritten speech notes, layered scraps,
COVER ONLY — single 16:9 image, not a grid.
Same recurring blog host character in every panel: man with round black glasses, voluminous ash-blonde quiff hair, salt-and-pepper short beard, charismatic presenter energy. Keep face recognizable; vary clothing, prefer thick heavyweight white hoodie when it fits; change pose, props, meme costume per panel.
CRITICAL: preserve EXACT face likeness from reference photo — same glasses, quiff hair, salt-and-pepper beard.
Clickbait hook scene: герой с reference-лицом, шок/ирония SEOшника, Wordstat + ноутбук, крючок на клик.
Large readable Cyrillic meme caption: "15k ключей — 0 прочтений?".
Hook idea: SEO-текст, который люди дочитают — миф или workflow?.
Russian internet meme collage, ironic SEO humor, host points at caption or reacts dramatically.
single canvas 2048x1152 pixels, exact
Negative: price badges, beige background, gray background, gradient, English text, Latin letters, watermark, logo, blurry, generic western stock photo, extra fingers, boring corporate infographic, no humor, no text at all, unreadable gibberish text

Professional Russian blog editorial UI mockup pasted on pure white #FFFFFF background, clean useful dashboard card aesthetic, accent #E85D4C, readable Cyrillic labels, 16:9 widescreen screenshot style,
Article section H2: «Зачем SEO и GEO в одной статье».
Таблица «SEO vs GEO» к секции «Зачем SEO и GEO в одной статье»: критерии, цели, что видит человек vs AI
looks like a helpful pasted screenshot with subtle shadow, pink sticky note corner and scotch tape, high detail UI elements, no human face required
Negative: beige background, gray background, gradient, meme impact font, cartoon mascot, watermark, English UI labels, blurry text

Clean Russian infographic workflow diagram on pure white #FFFFFF background, numbered steps connected by arrows, editorial blog style, colors #FFFFFF #1A1A2E #E85D4C #FFD93D, 16:9,
Article section H2: «Структура longread: от семантики до читабельности».
6 шагов workflow longread к «Структура longread: от семантики до читабельности»: интент → семантика → outline → lead → факты → FAQ
readable Cyrillic step titles, Notion/Figma-like clarity, practical how-to feel, no meme faces
Negative: beige background, gray background, gradient, meme, face closeup, watermark, chaotic collage, English text

Russian SEO article UI mockup on pure white #FFFFFF background showing FAQ accordion block and JSON-LD schema panel side by side, developer-blog aesthetic, light theme, 16:9,
Article section H2: «FAQ и schema: зачем и как».
UI mockup FAQ + JSON-LD schema для «FAQ и schema: зачем и как»
Cyrillic FAQ questions visible, structured data hint, helpful not humorous, no meme
Negative: beige background, gray background, gradient, meme, cartoon face, watermark, English-only UI
